name: вЂ‹вЂ‹Drowning in Her SeaвЂ‹вЂ‹
short_description: At first, it was tender, like the warmth of her fingertips. Then it became a weight, pressing against the chest, slowly filling the lungs.
detailed_description:
вЂ‹вЂ‹"Drowning in Her Sea" вЂ” A Dark Whisper of SubmersionвЂ‹вЂ‹

Water.

At first, it was tender, like the warmth of her fingertips. Then it became a weight, pressing against the chest, slowly filling the lungs.

You write back and forth between two names, the ink bleeding, blurring into a bruise of blue.

She asks what love is. You give an answer. The answer becomes another question.

The screen flickers occasionally, like a broken lighthouse. Save points scatter like buoysвЂ”each one you cling to pulls you deeper.

(Press X to keep sinking)

(Press O to stop breathing)

This is not a game about choices.

This is about how water learns to become a grave.
